query: Humane AI Pin CosmOS open source community offline functionality restoration progress

{"query":"Humane AI Pin CosmOS open source community offline functionality restoration progress","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1900,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://mashable.com/article/humane-ai-pin-discontinued-killed","title":"Humane has killed its Ai Pin less than a year after its release | Mashable","content":"In a post to Humane's support website, the company announced that all of its Ai Pins will stop working in just 10 days.
Humane notes that it will still offer offline features such as battery level.
The $116 million acquisition includes Humane's AI-powered operating system CosmOS, a swathe of intellectual property, and key technical personnel.
"Humane’s AI platform Cosmos, backed by an incredible group of engineers, will help us create an intelligent ecosystem across all HP devices from AI PCs to smart printers and connected conference rooms," HP's President of Technology and Innovation Tuan Tran said in a statement.
Though Humane quickly updated the clip, numerous other problems with the Ai Pin soon became apparent once users started getting their hands on the device in April last year.
Humane reportedly began searching for a buyer within mere weeks of shipping the Ai Pin, aiming to sell for $750 million to $1 billion."},{"url":"https://www.engadget.com/ai/humane-cosmos-kinda-turns-everything-into-a-pin-133018127.html","title":"Humane CosmOS kinda turns everything into a Pin","content":"Its universally derided AI pin was a flop, so Humane now pivoting to software.
The company just released a video showing how its CosmOS software could work in other devices like a car, TV and smart speaker as "an AI operating system built for a universe of connected devices." The only problem is that the software was a big part of what made the AI pin bad, and much of what Humane shows are "simulated experiences" for "illustrative purposes" rather than the AI in actual use.
"CosmOS is just using the context of what's on the screen to answer."
Humane notes that CosmOS is device and LLM agnostic, so it can work on cars, mobile devices, PCs, wearables and more.
"And as we get closer to releasing our SDK to the public, developers and enterprise will easily be able to add and integrate their agents data and services to CosmOS, leveraging the powerful ecosystem to provide even more utility to all types of devices and platforms," according to the voiceover.
Though it did have some useful features like context for follow-up questions, that's the least of things for any AI assistant in 2024."},{"url":"https://www.inverse.com/tech/humane-ai-pin-google-calendar-integration","title":"Humane Teases Three Major Features the Ai Pin Should Already Have Had at Launch","content":"Now that it’s rolled out its big Cosmos 1.1.4 software update to all Ai Pin users — improvements include faster AI responses and reduced thermals — Humane seems to be working hard to deliver on at least some of the features it promised for Cosmos 1.2 slated for this summer.
In a video posted to X, Humane product engineer Elizabeth Dorman shared the below video showing off Google Calendar integration.
Even more impressive, Dorman tells the Ai Pin to dial into the Google Meet event."},{"url":"https://tldr.tech/ai/2025-02-19","title":"Humane’s AI Pin is dead ⚰️, Meta LlamaCon 🦙, Mira Murati’s Thinking Machines Lab 🧠","content":"HP acquired most of Humane's assets for $116M, leading to the discontinuation of Humane's AI Pins.
The AI Pins will lose functionality by February 28.
Meta is launching LlamaCon, an open-source AI developer conference, on April 29.
OpenAI is considering building data center campuses in 16 states as part of President Trump's Stargate initiative, in partnership with Oracle, SoftBank, Microsoft, Nvidia, and Arm, aiming to invest up to $500 billion over four years."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Humane AI Pin CosmOS open source community offline functionality restoration progress","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.forbes.com/sites/stevenaquino/2024/10/10/new-cosmos-update-reminds-humanes-ai-pin-still-seemingly-discounts-disabled-people-as-human","title":"New CosmOS Update Reminds Humane's AI Pin Still ...","content":"The update, v1.2, includes of new functionality including “insane battery life,” expanded localization, and much more.","score":0.49729064,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.yankodesign.com/2025/06/19/humane-ai-pin-gets-resurrected-thanks-to-a-new-free-open-source-platform","title":"Humane AI Pin gets resurrected thanks to a new free Open ...","content":"Humane AI Pin gets resurrected thanks to a new free Open-Source Platform … has spent roughly 400 hours reverse-engineering the device to create","score":0.4858686,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.macrumors.com/2025/02/18/humane-ai-pin-discontinued","title":"Humane's $700 Ai Pin Discontinued and Defunct After Less Than 1 Year - MacRumors","content":"# Humane's $700 Ai Pin Discontinued and Defunct After Less Than 1 Year. Humane today informed customers that it is discontinuing its $700 Ai Pin at the end of February, with the device set to be taken offline less than a year after it launched in April 2024. The Ai Pin will work until 12:00 p.m. Pacific Time on February 28, which is just 10 days from now. Humane recommends that Ai Pin users sync their devices over Wi-Fi to download stored pictures, videos, and notes before February 28 because data will be deleted after that. The sudden discontinuation of the Ai Pin comes as Humane is being sold to HP for $116 million. HP is purchasing Humane's CosmOS AI platform and more than 300 patents and patent applications, plus HP will be hiring Humane's employees. ### Apple's 2026 Back to School Offer is Coming Soon. The Back to School offer is in...","score":0.45798564,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.hackster.io/news/adam-gastineau-looks-to-bring-humane-s-ai-pin-back-from-the-dead-with-penumbraos-8328e1324f75","title":"Adam Gastineau Looks to Bring Humane's Ai Pin Back From the Dead with PenumbraOS - Hackster.io","content":"# Adam Gastineau Looks to Bring Humane's Ai Pin Back From the Dead with PenumbraOS. Developer Adam Gastineau is looking to bring the ill-fated Humane Ai Pin back from the dead, with a fresh open source operating system that looks to turn the wearable gadgets from expensive bricks into functional tools again — eventually, at least. Those who had bought an Ai Pin were left with a brick as Humane's servers were shut down — which is were Gastineau's work comes in, working to find security holes in the device's customized Android operating system that will remove the restrictions put in place by Humane and allow the hardware to live again. The first is a software development kit (SDK), which Gastineau says, allows the Ai Pin to be treated \"like a mostly normal Android device.\" This will then be used to develop MABL, a modular assistant application that provides the ability to choose between local, self-hosted, and remote large language models, enable text-to-speech and speech-to-text, and bring back as much of the Ai Pin's promised functionality as possible.","score":0.43453383,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://github.com/MaxMaeder/OpenPin","title":"GitHub - MaxMaeder/OpenPin: OpenPin: use your Humane Ai Pin again. Installable in a few clicks & without any ADB certs! · GitHub","content":"You signed in with another tab or window. # OpenPin. OpenPin is an open-source project which lets you use your Ai Pin after Humane bricked them. If you order the PCB with the USB-port already soldered (as in the instructions below) you do **NOT** need to buy the 'Micro-USB Port' part. You will also need soldering tools and a 3D printer, depending on how much you choose to do yourself (versus using a service). The following instructions are for if you want to buy the PCBs with the surface mount USB port already soldered. * Click next, it will ask if you are sure you don't want to assemble the other rows, click confirm. * Push the pins of the part into the 4 matching holes on the board. **Make sure the part is on the same face of the board as the USB port!**. * Place the Pin Cradle overtop of this assembly, aligning it so the pogo pins protrude through the hole.","score":0.37806922,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":2.0,"request_id":"dcffabf0-a625-4fe7-aeb1-7992b2bea409"}
